---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    template: template.typ
    keep-typ: false
---

```{=typst}
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
//  GLOBAL STYLES
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#set text(font: "Arial", size: 11pt, fill: rgb("#374151"))
#set par(justify: true, leading: 0.75em)
#set block(spacing: 1.2em)

// ─── COLOR PALETTE ───
#let dark    = rgb("#0F172A")
#let card    = rgb("#1E293B")
#let green   = rgb("#10B981")
#let blue    = rgb("#3B82F6")
#let purple  = rgb("#8B5CF6")
#let amber   = rgb("#F59E0B")
#let red     = rgb("#EF4444")
#let muted   = rgb("#64748B")
#let light   = rgb("#F1F5F9")
#let border  = rgb("#E2E8F0")
#let bglight = rgb("#F8FAFC")

// ─── HELPER FUNCTIONS ───
#let divider(color: rgb("#10B981")) = {
  v(0.4em)
  line(length: 100%, stroke: 2.5pt + color)
  v(0.6em)
}

#let badge(content, color: rgb("#10B981")) = box(
  fill: color.lighten(85%),
  stroke: 0.5pt + color,
  radius: 3pt,
  inset: (x: 8pt, y: 4pt),
  text(size: 8.5pt, weight: "bold", fill: color, content)
)

#let kpi(value, label, color: rgb("#10B981")) = rect(
  fill: bglight,
  stroke: 0.5pt + border,
  radius: 6pt,
  inset: 14pt,
  width: 100%,
  align(center)[
    #text(size: 26pt, weight: "bold", fill: color, value)
    #v(0.1em)
    #text(size: 8.5pt, fill: muted, label)
  ]
)

#let section-heading(n, title, color: rgb("#10B981")) = {
  v(0.8em)
  grid(
    columns: (auto, 1fr),
    gutter: 12pt,
    align: horizon,
    rect(fill: color, radius: 4pt, inset: (x: 10pt, y: 6pt),
      text(weight: "bold", size: 10pt, fill: white, n)
    ),
    text(size: 17pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark, title)
  )
  divider(color: color)
}

#let callout(content, color: rgb("#10B981"), icon: "→") = rect(
  fill: color.lighten(92%),
  stroke: (left: 3pt + color),
  radius: (right: 6pt),
  inset: (x: 14pt, y: 12pt),
  width: 100%,
  text(size: 10.5pt, fill: dark, content)
)

#let trow(cells, fill: white) = {
  for c in cells {
    table.cell(fill: fill, c)
  }
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
//  COVER PAGE — no extra blank page before it
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
#set page(margin: 0cm, header: none, footer: none)

// Dark top band
#rect(fill: dark, width: 100%, height: 42%)[
    #pad(left: 2.5cm, right: 2.5cm, top: 2.5cm)[
      #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: green, tracking: 3pt)[AI CONSULTING PROPOSAL — MARCH 2026]
      #v(1.8em)
      #text(size: 46pt, weight: "black", fill: white)[CreatorIQ]
      #v(0.3em)
      #text(size: 16pt, fill: rgb("#94A3B8"))[AI-Powered Creator Intelligence Platform]
      #v(2em)
      #grid(
        columns: (auto, auto, auto, auto),
        gutter: 12pt,
        badge("52,000+ Real Deals", color: green),
        badge("4 AI Workflows", color: blue),
        badge("18 Niches · 6 Platforms", color: purple),
        badge("Live Demo Ready", color: amber),
      )
    ]
  ]

// White bottom section
#pad(left: 2.5cm, right: 2.5cm, top: 1.8cm)[
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, auto),
    gutter: 20pt,
    [
      #text(size: 14pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[Prepared for]
      #v(0.3em)
      #text(size: 22pt, weight: "black", fill: dark)[Chleo, CEO]
      #v(0.4em)
      #text(size: 11pt, fill: muted)[Creator Economy & Media Technology]
      #v(1.5em)
      #text(size: 10pt, fill: muted, style: "italic")[Confidential — Not for Distribution]
    ],
    rect(fill: bglight, stroke: 0.5pt + border, radius: 8pt, inset: 16pt)[
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: muted)[DOCUMENT OVERVIEW]
      #v(0.5em)
      #set text(size: 10pt, fill: dark)
      #list(
        [Problem & Opportunity],
        [Current Demo — What Works],
        [Complete Solution Design],
        [6-Month Roadmap],
        [Investment & Cost Plan],
        [Why Act Now],
      )
    ]
  )

  #v(2em)
  #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)
  #v(0.6em)
  #text(size: 9pt, fill: muted, style: "italic")[
    "The intelligence every creator deserves — backed by 52,000+ real brand deals and built with explainable AI at its core."
  ]
]

// Restore proper page settings after cover
#set page(
  paper: "us-letter",
  margin: (top: 2.5cm, bottom: 2.5cm, left: 2.5cm, right: 2.5cm),
  header: context {
    if counter(page).get().first() > 1 [
      #set text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb("#94A3B8"))
      #grid(
        columns: (1fr, auto),
        [CreatorIQ — AI Consulting Proposal #h(1fr) Confidential],
        [Page #counter(page).display()]
      )
      #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#E2E8F0"))
    ]
  },
  footer: context {
    if counter(page).get().first() > 1 [
      #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#E2E8F0"))
      #set text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb("#94A3B8"))
      #grid(
        columns: (1fr, auto),
        [Prepared for Chleo, CEO — AI Creator Intelligence Platform],
        [March 2026]
      )
    ]
  }
)

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
//  EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
#pagebreak()

#section-heading("01", "Executive Summary", color: green)

#text(size: 11pt)[
  Chleo, thank you for making time. I know the word *AI* raises immediate questions — about trust, transparency, and whether it actually helps real people. Those are the right questions, and this proposal answers every one of them.
]

#v(0.8em)

#text(size: 11pt)[
  I have built a working platform called *CreatorIQ* — an AI-powered deal intelligence tool for content creators. Part of it is already live. This document outlines what exists today, what it will become, and a clear 6-month plan with full cost breakdown to get it there.
]

#v(1em)

#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  gutter: 10pt,
  kpi("52K+", "Real deal records in benchmark engine", color: green),
  kpi("2", "Tools fully live today", color: blue),
  kpi("6 mo", "Full platform go-live timeline", color: purple),
  kpi("100%", "Uptime via AI fallback engine", color: amber),
)

#v(1.2em)

#callout[
  *This is not a pitch for a product that might exist one day.* The Deal Analyzer is running right now. The Market Dashboard is live. I will show you both during our meeting — no slides, no mockups, just the real working product.
]

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
//  THE PROBLEM
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
#pagebreak()

#section-heading("02", "The Problem We Are Solving", color: red)

#text(size: 11pt)[
  Content creators generate billions of dollars of brand value every year. Yet most of them sign deals with no idea whether they are being paid fairly — because the data that brands use to set rates has never been available to creators.
]

#v(1em)

#table(
  columns: (1.4fr, 2.6fr, 2fr),
  fill: (col, row) => if row == 0 { dark } else if calc.odd(row) { bglight } else { white },
  stroke: 0.5pt + border,
  inset: 11pt,
  table.header(
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[PROBLEM],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[WHAT CREATORS EXPERIENCE],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[REAL COST],
  ),
  text(weight: "bold", fill: red)[No Market Data],
  [Creators have zero visibility into what others in their niche charge. Brands have internal spreadsheets of accepted rates. Creators have nothing.],
  [Accept 20–40% below market rate],

  text(weight: "bold", fill: red)[Contract Traps],
  [Buried clauses give brands unlimited usage rights forever, exclusivity for years, and zero kill fees. Most creators never notice until it's too late.],
  [Legal liability + lost future income],

  text(weight: "bold", fill: red)[No Negotiation Power],
  [Without data, creators cannot push back. They accept the first offer — or worse, turn it down entirely out of uncertainty.],
  [\$18,000 lost per creator per year],
)

#v(1em)

#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  gutter: 10pt,
  rect(fill: red.lighten(90%), stroke: 0.5pt + red, radius: 6pt, inset: 14pt, width: 100%,
    align(center)[
      #text(size: 28pt, weight: "bold", fill: red)[73%]
      #v(0.2em)
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#374151"))[of micro-creators are underpaid on brand deals]
    ]
  ),
  rect(fill: amber.lighten(90%), stroke: 0.5pt + amber, radius: 6pt, inset: 14pt, width: 100%,
    align(center)[
      #text(size: 28pt, weight: "bold", fill: amber)[40%]
      #v(0.2em)
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#374151"))[below market — the typical opening offer from brands]
    ]
  ),
  rect(fill: blue.lighten(90%), stroke: 0.5pt + blue, radius: 6pt, inset: 14pt, width: 100%,
    align(center)[
      #text(size: 28pt, weight: "bold", fill: blue)[600M+]
      #v(0.2em)
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#374151"))[creators globally with zero access to deal intelligence]
    ]
  ),
)

#v(1em)

#callout(color: red)[
  *This is not a motivation problem.* The creator who accepted \$800 for a post worth \$3,000 was not lazy — they had no data. CreatorIQ gives them the data.
]

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
//  THE SOLUTION + WHAT'S LIVE NOW
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
#pagebreak()

#section-heading("03", "The Solution — What We Have Built", color: blue)

#text(size: 11pt)[
  CreatorIQ is a platform with four tools. *Two are fully live and working right now.* The other two exist as working placeholders — functional scaffolding ready to be powered up as part of the 6-month plan.
]

#v(1em)

#table(
  columns: (1.3fr, 1fr, 2.7fr, 1fr),
  fill: (col, row) => if row == 0 { dark } else if calc.odd(row) { bglight } else { white },
  stroke: 0.5pt + border,
  inset: 10pt,
  table.header(
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[TOOL],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[STATUS],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[WHAT IT DOES],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[AI MODEL],
  ),

  text(weight: "bold")[Deal Analyzer],
  badge("LIVE", color: green),
  [Enter niche, platform, follower count and offer → get real market rate, gap analysis, counter-offer, and negotiation talking points in under 3 seconds.],
  text(size: 9pt)[GPT-O4 + 52K benchmark fallback],

  text(weight: "bold")[Market Dashboard],
  badge("LIVE", color: green),
  [Visual intelligence across 18 niches and 6 platforms — rate ranges, deal health scores, content format benchmarks, and platform revenue breakdown.],
  text(size: 9pt)[52K real deal dataset],

  text(weight: "bold")[Contract Scanner],
  badge("PLACEHOLDER", color: amber),
  [UI and routing are built. Will flag dangerous clauses in brand contracts — unlimited usage rights, exclusivity traps, missing kill fees — before signing.],
  text(size: 9pt)[GPT-O3 — to be activated],

  text(weight: "bold")[Campaign Builder],
  badge("PLACEHOLDER", color: amber),
  [UI and routing are built. Will generate complete product launch email sequences — subject lines, send schedule, and audience-tailored copy — ready to send.],
  text(size: 9pt)[GPT-O1 — to be activated],
)

#v(1.2em)

#section-heading("", "Addressing Your AI Concerns Directly", color: blue)

#text(size: 10.5pt, style: "italic", fill: muted)[
  You said AI is not transparent. You were right to raise that. Here is how CreatorIQ handles it.
]

#v(0.6em)

#table(
  columns: (1.8fr, 3.2fr),
  fill: (col, row) => if row == 0 { dark } else if col == 0 { rgb("#FFF7ED") } else if calc.odd(row) { bglight } else { white },
  stroke: 0.5pt + border,
  inset: 11pt,
  table.header(
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[CLEO'S CONCERN],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[HOW CREATORIQ ADDRESSES IT],
  ),
  text(style: "italic")[_"How does it decide what the rate should be?"_],
  [Every result shows the source: "median of 350 comparable deals in fitness on Instagram". The percentile your offer sits at. The gap in dollars. No black boxes.],

  text(style: "italic")[_"What if the AI is wrong?"_],
  [The AI informs — the creator decides. The system always shows a confidence indicator. If the AI engine is unavailable, a local benchmark calculator using the full 52K dataset takes over automatically.],

  text(style: "italic")[_"Where does my data go?"_],
  [The AI orchestration engine (n8n) runs self-hosted inside Docker on your infrastructure. No deal data is sent to third-party servers. Every API call is logged and auditable.],

  text(style: "italic")[_"How do I sign up? Which AI is this?"_],
  [Phase 1 of the roadmap introduces user accounts with social media login. The AI models used are OpenAI GPT-O4, O3, and O1 — the same models powering enterprise tools globally.],
)

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
//  LIVE DEMO PLAN
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
#pagebreak()

#section-heading("04", "The Live Demo — What You Will See", color: purple)

#text(size: 11pt)[
  The meeting I am proposing is not a presentation. It is a live demonstration of working software. Here is the plan for our 35-minute session.
]

#v(1em)

#table(
  columns: (0.4fr, 1.6fr, 3fr, 0.8fr),
  fill: (col, row) => if row == 0 { dark } else if calc.odd(row) { bglight } else { white },
  stroke: 0.5pt + border,
  inset: 11pt,
  table.header(
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[\#],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[DEMO STEP],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[WHAT YOU WILL SEE],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[TIME],
  ),
  // ── LIVE TODAY ──
  table.cell(colspan: 4, fill: green.lighten(85%),
    text(weight: "bold", size: 9pt, fill: green)[✓  LIVE NOW — Fully working. Will be demonstrated live in the meeting]
  ),

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: green)[1]],
  text(weight: "bold")[Market Dashboard],
  [Live charts across 18 niches and 6 platforms — every number traceable to the 52K source dataset. You interact directly with the charts.],
  align(center)[#text(fill: green)[5 min]],

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: green)[2]],
  text(weight: "bold")[Deal Analyzer],
  [We enter a real brand deal together — your choice of niche and offer. AI returns market rate, gap, counter-offer, and talking points in under 3 seconds. Live.],
  align(center)[#text(fill: green)[8 min]],

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: green)[3]],
  text(weight: "bold")[AI Transparency Audit],
  [Open LangSmith — see every AI call logged in real time: inputs, outputs, latency, token cost. The full audit trail. Nothing is hidden.],
  align(center)[#text(fill: green)[7 min]],

  // ── TO BE BUILT ──
  table.cell(colspan: 4, fill: amber.lighten(85%),
    text(weight: "bold", size: 9pt, fill: amber)[→  ROADMAP PREVIEW — UI exists, AI not yet activated. Shown briefly to set context for the 6-month build plan]
  ),

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: amber)[4]],
  text(weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#92400E"))[Contract Scanner],
  [UI is built. No AI yet. Walk through the interface — shows what it will do: flag dangerous contract clauses before signing. Planned for Month 1–2.],
  align(center)[#text(fill: amber)[3 min]],

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: amber)[5]],
  text(weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#92400E"))[Campaign Builder],
  [UI is built. No AI yet. Shows the interface for generating email launch sequences. Planned for Month 3. Preview only — not functional.],
  align(center)[#text(fill: amber)[2 min]],

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: blue)[6]],
  text(weight: "bold")[Q&A + Next Steps],
  [Open discussion — your concerns, roadmap priorities, and what happens after this meeting.],
  align(center)[#text(fill: blue)[10 min]],
)

#v(1.2em)

#callout(color: purple)[
  *No mockups. No Figma prototypes. No "coming soon" slides.* The Deal Analyzer and Dashboard are running at localhost:3000 right now. I will share screen or bring my laptop. You will interact with the actual product.
]

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
//  6-MONTH ROADMAP
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
#pagebreak()

#section-heading("05", "6-Month Product Roadmap", color: purple)

#text(size: 11pt)[
  The platform foundation is built. The 6-month plan takes it from a working demo to a fully-launched, commercially-ready product — in three clear phases.
]

#v(1em)

// PHASE 1
#rect(fill: green.lighten(90%), stroke: (left: 4pt + green), radius: (right: 6pt), inset: 14pt, width: 100%)[
  #grid(
    columns: (auto, 1fr),
    gutter: 16pt,
    align: top,
    rect(fill: green, radius: 4pt, inset: (x: 10pt, y: 6pt))[
      #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: white)[PHASE 1 · Month 1–2]
    ],
    [
      #text(size: 13pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[Foundation & User Identity]
      #v(0.4em)
      #grid(
        columns: (1fr, 1fr),
        gutter: 8pt,
        text(size: 9.5pt)[✓ User authentication — social login (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok)],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[✓ Personalised dashboard per creator and niche],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[✓ Deal history saved per user account],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[✓ Profile setup — niche, platform, follower tier],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[✓ Activate Contract Scanner with GPT-O3],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[✓ Database migration to PostgreSQL for production],
      )
    ]
  )
]

#v(0.8em)

// PHASE 2
#rect(fill: blue.lighten(90%), stroke: (left: 4pt + blue), radius: (right: 6pt), inset: 14pt, width: 100%)[
  #grid(
    columns: (auto, 1fr),
    gutter: 16pt,
    align: top,
    rect(fill: blue, radius: 4pt, inset: (x: 10pt, y: 6pt))[
      #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: white)[PHASE 2 · Month 3–4]
    ],
    [
      #text(size: 13pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[Intelligence Expansion & Feature Completion]
      #v(0.4em)
      #grid(
        columns: (1fr, 1fr),
        gutter: 8pt,
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Activate Campaign Builder with GPT-O1],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ PDF export — deal analysis and contract reports],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Market rate alert notifications by email],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Bulk deal analysis — CSV upload for agencies],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Mobile-responsive UI across all 10 pages],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Expand benchmark data — 25+ niches],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Contract red-flag scoring (0–100 risk score)],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ RAG-powered content topic matching tool],
      )
    ]
  )
]

#v(0.8em)

// PHASE 3
#rect(fill: purple.lighten(90%), stroke: (left: 4pt + purple), radius: (right: 6pt), inset: 14pt, width: 100%)[
  #grid(
    columns: (auto, 1fr),
    gutter: 16pt,
    align: top,
    rect(fill: purple, radius: 4pt, inset: (x: 10pt, y: 6pt))[
      #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: white)[PHASE 3 · Month 5–6]
    ],
    [
      #text(size: 13pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[Scale, Launch & Agency Features]
      #v(0.4em)
      #grid(
        columns: (1fr, 1fr),
        gutter: 8pt,
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Cloud deployment — Railway / AWS (full CI/CD)],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Multi-creator agency dashboard],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ White-label option for talent agencies],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ AI chat interface — free-form deal Q&A],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Performance analytics and ROI tracking],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Admin dashboard — usage, costs, errors],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Full security audit and penetration test],
        text(size: 9.5pt)[→ Public launch — marketing and onboarding],
      )
    ]
  )
]

#v(1.2em)

// Visual timeline
#rect(fill: bglight, stroke: 0.5pt + border, radius: 6pt, inset: 14pt, width: 100%)[
  #text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: muted, tracking: 1pt)[6-MONTH TIMELINE AT A GLANCE]
  #v(0.6em)
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
    gutter: 4pt,
    ..for (m, label, color) in (
      ("Month 1", "Auth & Identity", green),
      ("Month 2", "Contract Scanner", green),
      ("Month 3", "Campaign Builder", blue),
      ("Month 4", "PDF · Alerts · Mobile", blue),
      ("Month 5", "Cloud Deploy · Agency", purple),
      ("Month 6", "Launch · AI Chat", purple),
    ) {
      (rect(fill: color, radius: 4pt, inset: (x: 6pt, y: 8pt), width: 100%,
        align(center)[
          #text(size: 8pt, weight: "bold", fill: white, m)
          #v(0.2em)
          #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: white.darken(10%), label)
        ]
      ),)
    }
  )
]

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
//  INVESTMENT & COST PLAN
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
#pagebreak()

#section-heading("06", "Investment & Cost Plan", color: amber)

#text(size: 11pt)[
  The following cost plan covers a realistic 6-month engagement — from activating the placeholders to a fully-launched commercial platform. All figures are based on actual market rates for senior AI development.
]

#v(1em)

// Development cost table
#text(size: 12pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[Development Investment]
#v(0.5em)

#table(
  columns: (0.8fr, 2fr, 3.2fr, 0.8fr, 0.8fr, 1fr),
  fill: (col, row) => if row == 0 { dark } else if calc.odd(row) { bglight } else { white },
  stroke: 0.5pt + border,
  inset: 10pt,
  table.header(
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[PHASE],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[PERIOD],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[DELIVERABLES],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[HOURS],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[RATE],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[COST],
  ),

  text(weight: "bold", fill: green)[Phase 1],
  [Month 1–2],
  [Auth, social login, personalised dashboard, deal history, Contract Scanner activation, PostgreSQL migration],
  align(center)[64 hrs],
  align(center)[\$65/hr],
  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold")[\$4,160]],

  text(weight: "bold", fill: blue)[Phase 2],
  [Month 3–4],
  [Campaign Builder activation, PDF export, market alerts, bulk CSV analysis, mobile UI, RAG expansion],
  align(center)[72 hrs],
  align(center)[\$65/hr],
  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold")[\$4,680]],

  text(weight: "bold", fill: purple)[Phase 3],
  [Month 5–6],
  [Cloud deployment, agency dashboard, white-label, AI chat interface, security audit, public launch],
  align(center)[80 hrs],
  align(center)[\$65/hr],
  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold")[\$5,200]],

  text(weight: "bold", fill: amber)[Discovery],
  [Week 1],
  [Technical architecture review, requirements alignment, infrastructure planning],
  align(center)[8 hrs],
  align(center)[\$65/hr],
  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold")[\$520]],

  table.cell(colspan: 5, fill: dark,
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white)[TOTAL DEVELOPMENT INVESTMENT]
  ),
  table.cell(fill: dark,
    align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: green, size: 12pt)[\$14,560]]
  ),
)

#v(1.2em)

// Monthly infrastructure
#text(size: 12pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[Monthly Infrastructure (Post-Launch)]
#v(0.5em)

#table(
  columns: (2.5fr, 1.5fr, 1.5fr, 2.5fr),
  fill: (col, row) => if row == 0 { dark } else if calc.odd(row) { bglight } else { white },
  stroke: 0.5pt + border,
  inset: 10pt,
  table.header(
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[SERVICE],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[STARTER],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[GROWTH],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[NOTES],
  ),
  [Cloud Hosting (Railway/AWS)], align(center)[\$25/mo], align(center)[\$80/mo], [Scales with users],
  [OpenAI API (usage-based)], align(center)[\$40/mo], align(center)[\$150/mo], [Pay per analysis],
  [n8n AI Orchestration], align(center)[\$0 self-hosted], align(center)[\$50/mo cloud], [Already running],
  [LangSmith Monitoring], align(center)[\$0 free tier], align(center)[\$39/mo], [Full AI observability],
  [Domain + SSL + CDN], align(center)[\$15/mo], align(center)[\$15/mo], [Fixed],
  [PostgreSQL (managed)], align(center)[\$10/mo], align(center)[\$29/mo], [Replaces SQLite],
  table.cell(colspan: 1, fill: dark, text(weight: "bold", fill: white)[MONTHLY TOTAL]),
  table.cell(fill: green.lighten(85%), text(weight: "bold", fill: green)[\$90/mo]),
  table.cell(fill: blue.lighten(85%), text(weight: "bold", fill: blue)[\$363/mo]),
  table.cell(fill: bglight, text(size: 9pt, fill: muted)[Starter = up to 500 users/mo]),
)

#v(1.2em)

// ROI section
#rect(fill: bglight, stroke: 0.5pt + border, radius: 6pt, inset: 16pt, width: 100%)[
  #text(size: 11pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[Return on Investment — The Business Case]
  #v(0.6em)
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
    gutter: 12pt,
    rect(fill: white, stroke: 0.5pt + border, radius: 4pt, inset: 12pt)[
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: muted)[IF 100 CREATORS RECOVER]
      #v(0.3em)
      #text(size: 20pt, weight: "bold", fill: green)[\$1.8M]
      #v(0.2em)
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#374151"))[in underpaid deals using CreatorIQ (\$18K avg × 100 users)]
    ],
    rect(fill: white, stroke: 0.5pt + border, radius: 4pt, inset: 12pt)[
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: muted)[PLATFORM COST AT 100 USERS]
      #v(0.3em)
      #text(size: 20pt, weight: "bold", fill: blue)[\$363/mo]
      #v(0.2em)
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#374151"))[total infrastructure running the platform for all 100 users]
    ],
    rect(fill: white, stroke: 0.5pt + border, radius: 4pt, inset: 12pt)[
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: muted)[REVENUE POTENTIAL (\$29/mo SaaS)]
      #v(0.3em)
      #text(size: 20pt, weight: "bold", fill: purple)[\$2,900/mo]
      #v(0.2em)
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#374151"))[monthly recurring revenue from 100 paying subscribers]
    ],
  )
]

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
//  WHY NOW + NEXT STEPS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════
#pagebreak()

#section-heading("07", "Why Now — The Market Opportunity", color: blue)

#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr),
  gutter: 16pt,
  rect(fill: amber.lighten(90%), stroke: 0.5pt + amber, radius: 6pt, inset: 14pt)[
    #text(size: 11pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[The Creator Economy Right Now]
    #v(0.6em)
    #list(
      text(size: 10pt)[\$250 billion global creator economy — growing 22% per year],
      text(size: 10pt)[600M+ active content creators globally],
      text(size: 10pt)[Brand spending on creator partnerships up 35% since 2023],
      text(size: 10pt)[Most creator tools focus on content scheduling — not money],
      text(size: 10pt)[No competitor combines real deal data + AI + contract scanning in one platform],
    )
  ],
  rect(fill: green.lighten(90%), stroke: 0.5pt + green, radius: 6pt, inset: 14pt)[
    #text(size: 11pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[Why CreatorIQ Wins]
    #v(0.6em)
    #list(
      text(size: 10pt)[*Real data* — 52,000+ actual brand deals, not estimates or surveys],
      text(size: 10pt)[*Explainable AI* — every result shows its source and reasoning],
      text(size: 10pt)[*Already built* — two tools live, zero development risk on the foundation],
      text(size: 10pt)[*Self-hosted* — creator data never leaves your infrastructure],
      text(size: 10pt)[*Fallback engine* — works even when AI is unavailable, 100% uptime],
    )
  ]
)

#v(1.2em)

#section-heading("08", "Proposed Next Steps", color: green)

#table(
  columns: (0.4fr, 1.4fr, 3.2fr, 1fr),
  fill: (col, row) => if row == 0 { dark } else if calc.odd(row) { bglight } else { white },
  stroke: 0.5pt + border,
  inset: 11pt,
  table.header(
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[\#],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[ACTION],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[DESCRIPTION],
    text(weight: "bold", fill: white, size: 9pt)[WHEN],
  ),
  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: green)[1]],
  text(weight: "bold")[Live Demo Meeting],
  [35-minute session. *Live*: Deal Analyzer + Market Dashboard + LangSmith audit. *Preview only*: Contract Scanner and Campaign Builder UI (placeholders — AI not yet active). Full Q&A.],
  [This week],

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: green)[2]],
  text(weight: "bold")[Letter of Intent],
  [A simple, one-page agreement to formalise the engagement. No complex legal terms at this stage — just clarity and commitment.],
  [Within 3 days],

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: blue)[3]],
  text(weight: "bold")[Discovery Session],
  [8-hour technical session: review architecture, align on priorities, confirm infrastructure decisions. Billed at standard rate.],
  [Week 1],

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: blue)[4]],
  text(weight: "bold")[Phase 1 Kick-off],
  [Begin authentication system and Contract Scanner activation — the two highest-value Phase 1 deliverables.],
  [Week 2],

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: purple)[5]],
  text(weight: "bold")[Monthly Reviews],
  [End of each phase — a 30-minute review session to demonstrate deliverables, gather feedback, and confirm Phase 2 priorities.],
  [Monthly],

  align(center)[#text(weight: "bold", fill: purple)[6]],
  text(weight: "bold")[Public Launch],
  [Full cloud deployment, domain live, onboarding flow complete. CreatorIQ is open to real users.],
  [Month 6],
)

#v(1.5em)

#callout(color: green)[
  *Chleo, you raised the right concern.* AI that no one understands is a liability — not an asset. CreatorIQ was designed from day one to be the opposite of that: every recommendation is sourced, every decision is yours, every AI call is logged. \
  \
  I am not asking you to trust AI. I am asking you to come to a meeting and watch it work. The platform is ready.
]

#v(1.5em)
#line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)
#v(0.6em)

#align(center)[
  #text(size: 13pt, weight: "bold", fill: dark)[CreatorIQ — AI Creator Intelligence]
  #v(0.3em)
  #text(size: 10pt, fill: muted)[
    Built with FastAPI · React · n8n (Docker) · OpenAI GPT-O4/O3/O1 · LangSmith · 52,000+ real brand deals
  ]
  #v(0.3em)
  #text(size: 10pt, style: "italic", fill: muted)[March 2026 · Confidential]
]
```
